text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Matikanefukukitaru's request, I head to the
park one night.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer, we have an emergency on our hands!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The sky is so jam-packed full of stars that some of
the constellations fell right out of it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Have a look!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Just kidding, hehe. These are zodiac-themed
chocolates, made with extra thought and care!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today's Valentine's Day, after all. It's only natural
for someone who enjoys fortune-telling to take
any and all celebrations seriously.
choice_data_list: Are you giving all of those chocolates to me?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course not! You just eat the one that
corresponds with your zodiac. That's what makes
it extra special.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So, which one is yours? What's your birth month
again?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look for the chocolate that corresponds with my
zodiac... but I notice one of the chocolates is
much, much bigger than all the others. What's
that about?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What's that you're looking at? Hmm, that one is...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Gyahhhhh! My Leo and Scorpio chocolates have
melted into one another!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sigh. I knew I shouldn't have winged it. I'm a total novice when it comes to making sweets.
choice_data_list: So what star sign is it now?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? It's Leo and Scorpio stuck
tog—oh, I see! It's a manticore!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The lion-scorpion hybrid from Persian mythology!
We've given birth to a new star sign!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Go on, try one. I'm sure even Zeus would be
shocked by how good these taste!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We eat the chocolates together, accompanied by
Fukukitaru's steady commentary. It makes for
quite the amusing Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So, which one is yours? What's your birth month
again?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Are you sure? Well, I'm a Gemini, so...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My Gemini chocolate is twice the size of the
others to account for both Castor and Pollux.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Right? Actually, I want you to do me a favor...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Can you share it with me? Sharing is caring, after
all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We split the chocolate in two. For some reason,
doing so seems to make it taste even sweeter...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yum! I prefer it this way! Way better than the
nerve-racking act of just giving someone a gift.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Sweet and simple, right? We get to share our
thoughts too. So, how was the chocolate?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, glad to hear it. Happy Valentine's Day,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My plan was to make you happy, but I'm feeling
pretty tickled myself as well.
